header.title: CSV to SQL Converter
header.subtitle: Transform CSV data into relational SQL scripts with ease.

generation.primaryKeyNote: Note: UPDATE and DELETE require one or more valid Primary Key columns to be selected for each table.

upload.prompt: Drop CSV files here or click to upload

tableConfig.primaryKeyHint: Select one or more columns to compose the primary key.

autoIncrementId.title: Auto Increment ID
autoIncrementId.hint: Generates an incremental identifier in INSERT statements for the main/parent table.

tableConfig.hasChildInSameFile: Has Child Table in Same File?

sqlGeneration.title: Generating SQL
sqlGeneration.message: Processing CSV data in the background.

fileRead.FILE_DECODING_ERROR: Failed to read or decode CSV file {{fileName}}.

validation.AUTO_INCREMENT_ID_COLUMN_REQUIRED: The auto ID column name is required for {{fileName}}.
validation.AUTO_INCREMENT_ID_START_AT_INVALID: The auto ID start value must be an integer for {{fileName}}.

sqlGeneration.INVALID_TYPED_VALUE: Invalid value for SQL generation in {{tableName}}. CSV column: {{columnOriginal}}, SQL column: {{columnSqlName}}, expected type: {{expectedType}}, received value: {{rawValue}}.
sqlGeneration.WORKER_RUNTIME_ERROR: SQL generation failed while running in the background.
sqlGeneration.WORKER_INVALID_RESPONSE: SQL generation returned an invalid response.
sqlGeneration.WORKER_EXECUTION_ERROR: The SQL generation worker encountered an unexpected error.

sql.pkRequiredUpdate: Error: at least one valid PK column is required for UPDATE
sql.pkRequiredDelete: Error: at least one valid PK column is required for DELETE
sql.noColumnsToUpdate: Error: no columns left to UPDATE in {{tableName}} after removing the selected PKs
sql.pkGroupingRequiredParentChild: Error: at least one valid Primary Key (Grouping Key) column is required for Parent-Child generation in {{tableName}}
